title: 50 Pcs Mini Christmas Metallic Gift Bows, 5 Colors Decorative Gift Bow, 2 Inch Self-Adhesive Wrapping Bows for Xmas Presents Wrapping, Valentine's Day, Weddings Party Decor (Multicolor)
features: Complete Festive Set: This set includes 50 pcs mini Christmas metallic gift bows, each with a 2-inch diameter. The decorative gift bows feature a rich metallic finish, adding a stylish and elegant touch to any present or festive decoration for various occasions.

Effortless Self-Adhesive Application: Designed with a self-adhesive wrapping bow backing, these bows are easy to apply—just peel and stick to any flat surface. Ideal for quick and beautiful gift wrapping, they can also be reused with tape, offering both convenience and versatility for Xmas presents and more.

Vibrant Color Assortment: These mini Christmas metallic gift bows come in 5 classic festive colors including silver and gold, enhancing their visual appeal. The vibrant color assortment ensures they complement any gift wrap style, making them perfect for Christmas, weddings, and Valentine’s Day.

Durable PET Material Quality: Crafted from reliable PET material, these Christmas metallic gift bows maintain their shape and color beautifully. The material ensures your gifts remain beautifully decorated throughout the holiday season and beyond.

Versatile Decorative Use: Versatile and festive, these 2-inch self-adhesive wrapping bows are suitable for a wide range of events including Christmas, birthdays, baby showers, and wedding party decor. Use them to embellish gift boxes, wreaths, garlands, and fruit baskets for a polished celebration look.
description: 50 Pcs Mini Christmas Metallic Gift Bows, 5 Colors Decorative Gift Bow, 2 Inch Self-Adhesive Wrapping Bows for Xmas Presents Wrapping, Valentine's Day, Weddings Party Decor
